step_1_scanned_metadata.narrative_summary: The Virginia Horton case details a woman's childhood experiences involving unexplained memory gaps and physical marks, which she later explored through hypnotic regression with Budd Hopkins and Dr. Aphrodite Clamar. The primary incident occurred when she was six years old on her grandfather's farm in Manitoba, where she suddenly found herself in the yard with a deep, clean cut on her leg and no memory of how she got there or left the barn. A second incident at age sixteen in Germany involved missing time and blood on her blouse after seeing a 'mystical deer'. Under hypnosis, Virginia recalled being on a comfortable, elegant, pearly-gray craft, where she was told by a grandfatherly, non-physical presence that a small sample of her was needed for a 'puzzle' they were working on. She described the entities as tall, slim humanoids with different skin, bones, and eyes, gray in color, and with larger brains, who communicated telepathically and explained their origins from distant stars.

encounter_events.source_citation: All of a sudden, I was in the yard and I didn't remember going from the barn into the yard towards the house.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes a classic time lapse — she was in the barn and then suddenly in the yard with no memory of the transition, indicating missing time.

encounter_events.source_citation: All of a sudden, I was in the yard and I didn't remember going from the barn into the yard towards the house.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia was relocated from the barn to the yard without any awareness of how she traveled that distance, fitting the relocation motif.

encounter_events.source_citation: I pulled up my blue jeans and when I scratched my leg I realized it was wet. I was covered with blood, from a cut on the back of my calf. It was a large and clean cut . . . no dirt or anything. It must have been at least a half-inch deep and an inch long. It was bleeding, but there was no pain.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A wound of unknown origin — a large, clean, deep cut on her calf — was discovered bleeding after the time lapse, with no memory of how it was inflicted. This matches A108: wound of unknown origin opens and bleeds.

encounter_events.source_citation: She had been holding the first event in the back of her mind all these years—ever since she was six years old—thinking, 'There's something odd about this and when I grow up I'm going to understand it.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia retained fragmentary memories of the experience for decades, sensing something was odd but unable to fully understand it, matching A116.1: fragmentary memories of an experience persist.

encounter_events.source_citation: One second, she had been in the barn gathering eggs and, the next second, she was standing in the yard with a bleeding leg.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes a classic time lapse: she has no memory of the transition from being in the barn to standing in the yard, indicating missing time.

encounter_events.source_citation: One second, she had been in the barn gathering eggs and, the next second, she was standing in the yard with a bleeding leg.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia was relocated from inside the barn to the yard without any awareness of how she traveled that distance, fitting the relocation motif.

encounter_events.source_citation: a half-inch deep slit on the back of one's calf / It left a very nice, straight scar . . . the only scar I have on my body.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes a linear scar resulting from a clean, straight cut of unknown origin — a permanent mark consistent with the linear or circular scar aftereffect motif.

encounter_events.source_citation: this cut didn't hurt despite all the blood pouring out / It was clean. There wasn't any dirt in it. It wasn't ragged
encounter_events.ai_justification: The unexplained wound — a clean, painless cut with no corresponding damage to clothing — matches the motif of spots or marks like puncture wounds or soreness appearing as physical aftereffects.

encounter_events.source_citation: even at that age I realized there was something very weird about the cut, and later I ripped the bandage off, thinking 'I want to remember this.' / 'I want to see this wound. There's something fascinating, completely fascinating about it.' Normally I didn't like to look at blood or anything like that and I always cried and carried on when I hurt myself.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia's reaction to the wound was completely uncharacteristic — she was normally pain-sensitive and averse to blood, yet she was fascinated and deliberately removed the bandage to study the wound. This is an inappropriate or uncharacteristic behavioral response.

encounter_events.source_citation: there was no rip or tear in her blue jeans, despite the fact that the cut was far up her leg, near the place of her calf's maximum thickness.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The clothing was undamaged despite a deep wound beneath it, implying the clothing was removed and replaced — consistent with finding clothes rearranged after the encounter.

encounter_events.source_citation: I had been separated from my brother and I didn't remember where I had been / she said that was a time when I was missing and no one knew where I was.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia experienced a period of missing time during which she was separated from her brother and had no memory of where she had been, confirmed by her mother.

encounter_events.source_citation: I had been separated from my brother and I didn't remember where I had been
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia has no memory of the transition between being in the woods and emerging from them — a doorway amnesia consistent with E201, where the witness blacks out during a key transition.

encounter_events.source_citation: I had blood on my blouse from somewhere, as though I had been splattered. / There was nothing, no wound, but I had blood on my blouse from somewhere
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia was found with blood on her blouse with no identifiable wound — blood of unknown origin appearing on the witness, consistent with A108.

encounter_events.source_citation: the only thing I could remember is that I saw a beautiful deer in the woods. It was almost like a mystical deer . . . it was very strange.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia retains only a fragmentary, screen-like memory of a mystical deer from the missing time period, consistent with fragmentary memories persisting after an experience.

encounter_events.source_citation: I saw a beautiful deer in the woods. It was almost like a mystical deer . . . it was very strange.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The 'mystical deer' appears to be a perceptual distortion or screen memory — an illusory image masking the actual experience during the missing time.

encounter_events.source_citation: I remember, when I was about thirteen, dreaming about traveling in outer space and going far, far away and meeting people that I knew like they were old friends
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia reports a recurring-type dream from age thirteen involving space travel and meeting beings, consistent with abduction dreams that come to the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: meeting people that I knew like they were old friends, and I talked to them about things and they explained things to me and showed me things
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings in the dream are described as familiar, friendly, like old friends — consistent with beings who are friendly and familiar in manner.

encounter_events.source_citation: I wanted to stay there, but they said no, I had to go back.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings tell Virginia she must return, consistent with beings saying the time has come to return.

encounter_events.source_citation: I wanted to stay there, but they said no, I had to go back.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia's desire to stay and reluctance to leave implies a sense of loss on departure, consistent with E303.

encounter_events.source_citation: they explained things to me and showed me things
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings explain and show things to Virginia, consistent with beings who have come to teach.

encounter_events.source_citation: They said I could share what I knew with my friends, but I couldn't stay.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings grant permission to share knowledge with friends — this is the opposite of M118 (secrecy) and does not match any existing motif code precisely. It is a novel permission to disseminate.

encounter_events.source_citation: Both times, on the farm as a child and on the picnic in France as a sixteen-year-old, Virginia herself was aware of time she could not account for.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia consciously recognized unaccounted-for time in both incidents, a classic time lapse (E200). This awareness was prior to hypnosis.

encounter_events.source_citation: Her brother insisted he had been searching for her and calling for at least a half hour. The discrepancy was immediately swept aside when Virginia's mother spotted the blood on her shirt.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Corroboration of the time lapse during the farm incident: Virginia's brother confirms approximately 30 minutes unaccounted for, which Virginia could not explain. This is a separate event instance from the general awareness of time lapses, specifically documenting the farm childhood event.

encounter_events.source_citation: when she came out of the woods just before she discovered the blood on her blouse
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia discovered blood on her blouse of unknown origin after emerging from the woods during the farm incident. A108 covers wounds of unknown origin that open and bleed, and the unexplained blood is consistent with this motif.

encounter_events.source_citation: something happened for a short time that the witness cannot recall / she had been missing...the missing time period seems to be somewhere from a half-hour to one hour long
encounter_events.ai_justification: The investigator confirms that Virginia experienced a period of missing time during the French woods incident, estimated at 30 minutes to one hour, which she cannot recall. This is referenced as established fact from family testimony, not recovered under hypnosis.

encounter_events.source_citation: the film of Virginia discovering the blood on her blouse
encounter_events.ai_justification: Blood discovered on Virginia's blouse after the encounter constitutes a physical mark or wound-like aftereffect noticed after the event, documented on film. This was a conscious discovery, not recovered under hypnosis.

encounter_events.source_citation: I reached down to scratch and it still itches, so I pull up my jeans and—I wasn't looking at my leg, just reached my hand down and my hand feels all wet, so then I look down and my hand is all covered with blood and I see blood on my leg / I see that I have a cut and the cut's deep; it's bleeding and dripping down my leg into my sock
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia discovers a deep, bleeding wound of unknown origin on her leg. She has no memory of being cut and cannot identify what caused it. This matches A108: wound of unknown origin opens and bleeds.

encounter_events.source_citation: it's not even as though it's my blood. It's somebody else's blood; somebody else's cut / Like it isn't even part of me. Like I'm looking at somebody else's leg.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia experiences a dissociative state where she perceives the wound and blood as belonging to someone else, as if observing another person's body. This out-of-body-like detachment from her own physical form maps to E111.

encounter_events.source_citation: I don't know. All of a sudden there was blood. I don't know what it was from. / I don't know. I just . . . suddenly it was bleeding. I don't know what I cut it on.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia has a complete gap in memory for the period during which the wound was inflicted. She cannot recall any event that caused the cut, indicating a time lapse or missing time during which something happened to her leg.

encounter_events.source_citation: the wound itself doesn't have any feeling at all / 'No, it doesn't hurt.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The deep wound causes no pain whatsoever, implying that whatever caused the cut also suppressed pain sensation. This absence of pain in a deep wound implies an external agent with no understanding of or concern for pain, mapping to B756.

encounter_events.source_citation: Well, I'm kind of afraid to watch myself get cut. That will bother me. / there is a definite resistance to
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia exhibits strong psychological resistance to recovering the memory of how the cut occurred, suggesting fragmentary memories persist at a subconscious level that she is afraid to access. This maps to A116.1: fragmentary memories of an experience persist.

encounter_events.source_citation: I was just lying on the couch, a little couch like this. It was comfortable, you know, like a bed or almost like a medical thing
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness describes lying on a couch/bed that resembles a medical examining table, matching X155 (witness lies on examining table or couch).

encounter_events.source_citation: it does not have the quality of a doctor's office. It's not chromey and white and the light's bright, There's plenty of light but I think maybe— it might be pale gray or a real soft gray. It's pearly. Those kinds of colors.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The room has plenty of light but is described as soft, pearly gray — not bright and clinical. This matches U236 (dim, indirect lighting).

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm trying to think if it had some smell. Clean. Really an ozone smell. That was the smell. Kind of a clean smell, but nothing very specific.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness describes an ozone smell in the craft environment, directly matching U252 (smells of ozone, sulphur, metal).

encounter_events.source_citation: I was really relaxed and almost at home. Comfortable. Curious. Like you feel when you're a guest of somebody and you're glad to be there.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness describes feeling deeply relaxed, comfortable, and at ease — matching E300 (pacification effect: witness calm, euphoric, relaxed).

encounter_events.source_citation: Like you feel when you're a guest of somebody and you're glad to be there.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness senses friendliness and feels welcomed, as if among familiar hosts. This matches E301 (friendly effect: witness senses kindness or feels as if among friends).

encounter_events.source_citation: it seems that I was told about the cut, that it wouldn't hurt and that there was a reason for it
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings promised the witness that the procedure would not cause pain, matching M102 (promise a test will not cause pain).

encounter_events.source_citation: I just could say it was direct communication with my mind, but I wouldn't necessarily claim it was telepathic / the communication process wasn't a difficult one, whether it was direct mental communication or words or English . .. it was just that at that age . . . the communication was straightforward and I didn't even think about how it worked
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness describes direct mental communication — understanding meanings conveyed to her mind without difficulty in the communication process itself. Matches C110 (subject hears voice in head or understands meanings).

encounter_events.source_citation: It was sort of like how my grandfather explained things to me—just explaining, a friendly person who was explaining things
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicating is described as friendly and grandfatherly in manner, matching B900 (beings are friendly, polite, familiar in manner).

encounter_events.source_citation: explaining that we need a little, bitty piece of you for understanding . . . and it was as though they had a puzzle that they were working on and it was very important to them.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings explain they need a sample for understanding, working on an important puzzle — they have come to learn or experiment. Matches M125 (they have come to learn, teach or experiment).

encounter_events.source_citation: explaining that we need a little, bitty piece of you for understanding
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings express interest in the witness's physical composition by requesting a tissue sample for their understanding. Matches B711 (interest in chemical composition, internal makeup).

encounter_events.source_citation: I think my leg was cut with a scalpel. It was just really sharp and clean . .. as if somebody made a nice, clean quick incision / They took a little cut.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings made a clean incision on the witness's leg with a scalpel-like instrument, matching X222 (beings make incision for unknown purpose).
encounter_events.emotional_marker: expected pain but did not feel it

encounter_events.source_citation: They took a little cut. They didn't mean to hurt me.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A small piece of tissue was taken from the incision on the leg, matching X231 (beings scrape a sample of skin from the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: it was as though somebody was doing the explaining and someone else was the one who did it (the cutting).
encounter_events.ai_justification: There is a division of labor: one being explains/directs while another performs the procedure, matching B802 (one being acts as examiner, doctor, or director).

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm so overwhelmed by being in the place that I am that I don't even remember getting
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia cannot recall how she transitioned from outside (the chicken coop area) to inside the craft. This is doorway amnesia — a blackout on entering the craft.

encounter_events.source_citation: it was as though I was in a room by myself and yet I knew I wasn't. It's as though they said, 'You can't see us because you wouldn't understand how we look.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings are present but unseen. Virginia senses their presence and is told she cannot see them.

encounter_events.source_citation: You can't see us because you wouldn't understand how we look.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings tell the witness that their appearance is not for her to see, as she would not understand it. This maps to beings telling the subject a sight is not for their eyes.

encounter_events.source_citation: somebody was in a different room and talking to me and I knew there was somebody talking to me / they explained to me what the equipment would do, you know, and how and why
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia hears communication in her head from unseen beings — she understands meanings without seeing anyone speak. The beings explain equipment functions telepathically.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's as though there are more people than one but I think I only talked to one.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Only one being communicates with the witness despite multiple beings being present, matching the principle of limited communication.

encounter_events.source_citation: it just reminds me of somebody I've known, like my grandfather . . . somebody who's older and whom I'm very comfortable around, like a very explaining type of person.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The communicating being is perceived as elder-like, reminiscent of her grandfather — an older, wise figure. This maps to one being acting as an elder.

encounter_events.source_citation: there was a gentleness about it. It wasn't anything abrupt. Whoever it is, it's someone I'm very comfortable with.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described as gentle, not abrupt, and the witness feels very comfortable — the being is helpful and considerate.

encounter_events.source_citation: Whoever it is, it's someone I'm very comfortable with. It's either somebody that I've known
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness senses kindness and feels as if she knows the being, mapping to the friendly effect where the witness feels as if among familiar company.

encounter_events.source_citation: the room is like a round room or half of a round room / what I'm looking at is round, I think, and it's like the walls are round, too. Round. It has a quality like the TWA terminal at JFK—round, curved walls.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The interior room is described as round with curved walls, matching the round/oval room interior description.

encounter_events.source_citation: it's big—it seems it's big—it seems, it seems—um—bigger than your (Dr. Clamor's) living room, it seems maybe bigger than my living room, but not quite as big as my whole apartment. It's a big space.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The interior seems very large, and the witness notes she was smaller (a child), implying the interior seems disproportionately large. This maps to interior seeming too large relative to external appearance.

encounter_events.source_citation: things that shine, they're sparkly, like crystals or like instrumentation or . . . but they're so pretty that they don't distinguish in my eyes between whether they are things, or art. Just pretty. Like pearls and like crystals and like metal . . . mostly silver.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The room contains crystalline, sparkly objects that could be instrumentation or art — matching the motif of crystalline spheres/objects in the room.

encounter_events.source_citation: mostly silver. It doesn't seem to be gold-colored. It seems to be silver-colored.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The interior is predominantly silver-colored, matching the silvery interior description.

encounter_events.source_citation: the light doesn't come from any one place and it isn't all the same color. It changed a little bit and there are colors in different places, but only soft.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The lighting is bright and uniform without a specific source, with soft color variations — matching diffuse lighting without a specific source.

encounter_events.source_citation: it could be that it was just all handled by automatic equipment, except that they explained to me what the equipment would do
encounter_events.ai_justification: Equipment operates automatically without visible human or being control, matching the motif of a machine acting as if on its own.

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm just in the yard and then I'm somewhere else gently, nothing noisy or flashy or abrupt about it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes being relocated from her yard to another place without awareness of the transition, matching E205 (relocation: witness travels a distance unawares).

encounter_events.source_citation: I was just doing something and then all of a sudden I'm somewhere else. Nothing rough about it. / Just, 'here I am.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness has no memory of the transition between being in the yard and arriving at the new location, indicating doorway amnesia (E201).

encounter_events.source_citation: Quiet, too. There's not much sound . . . maybe a soft, soft, soft subdued hum or noise like a humidifier makes, but there's not a lot of noise.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes the environment as notably quiet with only a very subdued hum, matching U259 (silence) in the craft interior.

encounter_events.source_citation: maybe a soft, soft, soft subdued hum or noise like a humidifier makes
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness perceives a soft humming sound, consistent with U530 (buzzing, humming or other monotonous sound).

encounter_events.source_citation: The place is like a dream, except the person's not like a dream. / It's almost like it's a dream.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes perceptual distortion where the environment feels dreamlike and unreal, matching E106 (perceptual distortions and illusions).

encounter_events.source_citation: A very grandfatherly quality about him, a quality that reminds me of my grandfather, who is very loving and very patient
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described as grandfatherly, patient, and elder-like, matching B801 (one being is an elder).

encounter_events.source_citation: likes to explain and share things with me and he's fun. / 'Hello, how are you? How are things?'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described as friendly, fun, and familiar in manner, matching B900 (beings are friendly, polite, familiar in manner).

encounter_events.source_citation: The communication is very real.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes communication that feels very real and direct with the being, in a context where no verbal language is specified, suggesting telepathic understanding (C110).

encounter_events.source_citation: somebody I knew. You know, like 'How are you? How are things here and how have you been?' / 'This is such a nice place.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness senses kindness and feels as if she knows the being, matching E301 (friendly effect: witness senses kindness or feels as if among friends).

encounter_events.source_citation: we're from a long way away, from one of those places
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being tells the witness they come from a distant star, indicating their origin in vague terms, matching M130 (beings tell the witness where they originate, but in vague or general terms).

encounter_events.source_citation: he spent some time explaining to me that there are different kinds of places / pretty much like explaining to a child about foreign places
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being takes time to teach the witness about the cosmos, different worlds and peoples, matching M125 (they have come to learn, teach or experiment).

encounter_events.source_citation: each one of those stars is a place like the sun that has its own places, like your place. And all of those stars have their places. There are a lot of things there, a lot of different homes / some that are like where I live and some that are very different and some that are very nice and some that aren't and some that are modern and some that aren't
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being describes scenes of other worlds and their diversity to the witness, presenting views of the otherworld through communication, matching W400 (the otherworld or scenes from it appear through a window or are described).

encounter_events.source_citation: he explains why I am there (in the croft) . . . that I am part of that adventure of discovering a new place
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being explains their purpose: they have come to learn and explore, and the witness is part of that discovery mission.

encounter_events.source_citation: a long description of the variousness of life, places that people live and the adventures of visiting different places and learning more about it / I don't know whether he calls to mind or his description calls to mind
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicates complex concepts about the diversity of life and places, with the witness understanding meanings directly, suggesting telepathic or mind-to-mind communication rather than spoken language.

encounter_events.source_citation: I guess I ask him what his place is like, too, and, umm, what did he say? He says his place is different, that it would look strange to me, but not super-strange
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being describes where they come from in vague, non-specific terms — different but not super-strange — fitting the motif of telling the witness about their origin in an indefinite way.

encounter_events.source_citation: he was very happy. He was very happy about meeting me and about visiting, about talking to me. It's like the whole thing is a big happiness for him
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described as very happy and excited about the interaction, indicating beings who are happy in their work or activity.

encounter_events.source_citation: he's trying to share their excitement with me / mostly friendly, but not all
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is friendly and familiar in manner, trying to share excitement and establish rapport with the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm not so excited as I am just kind of happy about it / he's just like another one of them. You know, like discovering another old friend.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness senses kindness and feels as if the being is a familiar, friendly presence — like an old friend or grandparent figure.

encounter_events.source_citation: he has hands, says he has hands, it's like his fingers are longer. Well, I mean, maybe not longer, but it's like they're skinnier.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's fingers are described as longer or skinnier than human fingers, matching the motif of fingers long and thin.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think he says that they're a little grayer than we are in color
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being describes their skin as grayish in color, matching the motif of gray or ashen skin.

encounter_events.source_citation: they might not have two eyes; they might have three or they might have two. I'm not sure about that, but they have eyes
encounter_events.ai_justification: The possibility of three eyes indicates a number of eyes other than two, fitting the motif of eyes numbering other than two.

encounter_events.source_citation: The eyes are different than ours. I don't remember exactly how. They might not have eyelids
encounter_events.ai_justification: The absence of eyelids implies an unusual blinking mechanism or lack thereof, fitting the motif of eyes that blink in an unusual way.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think they stand; I think they have a body that stands up like ours does.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being has a humanoid body that stands upright like a human.

encounter_events.source_citation: Tall. Slim-type body.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described as tall, fitting the motif of beings over 6 feet.

encounter_events.source_citation: Slim-type body.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The slim body type matches the motif of spindly build and slight musculature.

encounter_events.source_citation: he says his insides are arranged different, and I think he says something about the brain is a percentage of their
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being discusses differences in internal arrangement and brain composition, indicating interest in or disclosure about chemical composition and internal makeup.

encounter_events.source_citation: he's just like another one of them. You know, like discovering another old friend. I have always had older people, friends, who explain things to me
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is perceived as an elder figure, likened to the witness's grandparents and older friends who explain things, suggesting the being functions as an elder.

encounter_events.source_citation: it seems like whatever it is it reminds me of a masculine thing, grandfatherly.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described as humanoid with masculine, grandfatherly qualities, fitting B201 (humanoid).

encounter_events.source_citation: it seems like whatever it is it reminds me of a masculine thing, grandfatherly.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is perceived as masculine, fitting B210.

encounter_events.source_citation: Grandfatherly. He's old. Yes, he's definitely old
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described as very old and grandfatherly, fitting B801 (one being is an elder).

encounter_events.source_citation: I think hair. I don't remember whether they don't have any hair or whether the hair is different
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness is uncertain but suggests hair is absent or very different, best mapped to B295 (hair absent) or B296. The uncertainty leans toward absence.

encounter_events.source_citation: Maybe like soft, pearly leather.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The skin is described as smooth, soft, and pearly like leather, fitting B291 (skin cold, sunless, sickly, soft) — specifically the 'soft' quality.

encounter_events.source_citation: their head is a bigger part of their total body . . . it's a bigger part of them.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The head is described as proportionally larger relative to the body, fitting B230 (head large).

encounter_events.source_citation: he's definitely old and he doesn't tell me how old old is. He's just old.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being claims to be very old but refuses to specify age, implying an odd relationship with time or age, fitting B751 (beings speak oddly of time).

encounter_events.source_citation: I think I just talked to one person.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Only one being communicated with the witness, fitting C121 (principle of limited communication: only one being communicates).

encounter_events.source_citation: It seems like a long time. It seems like a whole afternoon, you know, a long, relaxed afternoon.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The encounter is described as long and relaxed, implying a friendly, familiar manner from the being, fitting B900.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's almost as though the couch has a thing on it which does that by itself
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness lies on a couch-like surface during the procedure, fitting X155 (witness lies on examining table or couch).

encounter_events.source_citation: It's almost as though the couch has a thing on it which does that by itself, and I didn't see the person who does it. It's as though it's done remotely.
encounter_events.ai_justification: An incision is performed remotely by an automated device on the couch, fitting X222 (beings make incision for unknown purpose).

encounter_events.source_citation: It's as though wherever I am lying they're on that side of me behind the wall, or perhaps that's just where the sound comes from. It's as though I am talking to them over there in the next room.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A wall or barrier separates the witness from the beings, fitting U309 (a window, transparent wall or barrier separates witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: I breathe my kind of air. I guess they breathe different air.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings breathe different air from the witness, implying the atmospheric conditions are different and the separation is for atmospheric reasons. This maps to U253 (air noxious, sickening, irritating) as the beings' air would be unsuitable for the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: whatever it is it's for my comfort. All this, it's just like you find it so natural. Matter of fact.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings arrange the environment for the witness's comfort, fitting B901 (beings are helpful and considerate).

encounter_events.source_citation: All this, it's just like you find it so natural. Matter of fact.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness finds the entire experience completely natural and matter-of-fact, indicating a pacification effect (E300).

encounter_events.source_citation: VH discusses wanting to see them again, but how can they find her?
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness wants to see the beings again and they discuss how they can find her, implying a promise or expectation of return, fitting M149 (beings promise to return to the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: It's almost as though he can identify me by . . . it's just like I stick out who I am / he can recognize a voice. It's sort of like recognizing brain waves, or something . . . it's like everybody has their own pattern, own trademark
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being can uniquely identify and locate the witness by her personal pattern, implying they have special knowledge of and interest in her, fitting M122 (they have watched witness a long time, have special interest).

encounter_events.source_citation: He said, 'It's like recognizing your voice.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicates directly with the witness, and the overall communication throughout appears telepathic or mental given the separation by a wall. This fits C110 (subject hears voice in head or understands meanings).

encounter_events.source_citation: They just said, 'Take a little, teeny piece of you home.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings take a small tissue sample from the witness, fitting X231 (beings scrape a sample of skin from the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: it's like a combination of a souvenir
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings describe the tissue sample as a 'souvenir' they are taking from the witness, fitting S105 (beings take objects from the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: a combination of a souvenir and a way of getting to know me better.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings describe taking something from the witness as a 'souvenir,' which maps to S100 (beings take objects or samples from the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: And they asked my permission and they said it's very important and it won't hurt.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings promise the procedure will not cause pain, mapping to M102 (promise a test will not cause pain).

encounter_events.source_citation: And I say, 'Fine.' So I don't watch.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness readily agrees and complies without resistance, as if trusting the beings, mapping to E214 (witness reassures self or obeys beings as if they know best).

encounter_events.source_citation: I don't think it feels anything more than when you rub your fingernail on your skin
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings scrape or take a sample from the witness's skin/leg area, mapping to X231 (beings scrape a sample of skin from the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: they said, 'No, we'll just stop it from bleeding.' So whatever they do, they do it, you know, like this, and then it just closes itself and stops bleeding
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings heal the wound by touch, closing it and stopping the bleeding instantly, mapping to E321 (laying on of hands or other magical relief of pain/injury).

encounter_events.source_citation: I guess they leave it attached to me. I mean next to me as though it's just holding it against me, and uh—yeah, it's against my leg.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings leave a device attached to or against the witness's leg, mapping to X246 (beings implant a device in the body).

encounter_events.source_citation: he has to explain to me that in a while that I can't remember him . . . yeah . . . and 'You won't be able to remember unless you see me again.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being tells the witness she will forget the encounter, mapping to M119 (beings tell subject to forget, because the time is not right).

encounter_events.source_citation: He says, you know, people will be upset / 'you don't want them to treat you like you're weird just because you visited me.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being explains that others would react negatively, effectively swearing the witness to secrecy about the encounter, mapping to M118 (beings swear the subject to secrecy).

encounter_events.source_citation: We laugh about some things. I can't remember what. Some things are funny. Some kind of chuckley things
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings share laughter with the witness, indicating a sense of humor, mapping to B915 (beings have sense of humor).

encounter_events.source_citation: he just asked me if I would like to visit him at his home, and I said, 'Yes, I would.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being invites the witness to come to his home, mapping to M115 (beings ask subject to come away with them).

encounter_events.source_citation: he seems to enjoy how much I enjoy all the sparkly things.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being shows a friendly, familiar manner by taking pleasure in the witness's enjoyment, mapping to B900 (beings are friendly, polite, familiar in manner).

encounter_events.source_citation: He explains about all those wonderful, interesting places to visit. How different life is in different places and . . . the different kinds of animals and plants and people and different ways of doing things / Yes, he said he could take me there, but that it would take a while and that we didn't have time now.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being invites the witness to come away with him to visit other places, describing the adventure of traveling to see different life forms and worlds. This maps to M115 (beings ask subject to come away with them).

encounter_events.source_citation: the different kinds of animals and plants and people and different ways of doing things, and that it's so interesting to see and learn about them
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being describes otherworldly places with unfamiliar plants, animals, and people, mapping to W104 (otherworld has unfamiliar plants and animals).

encounter_events.source_citation: he painted a wonderful picture of all there is to see. Beautiful things, unbelievable things . . . and no end to them.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being describes the otherworld as beautiful and boundless, mapping to W105 (otherworld is beautiful and fertile).

encounter_events.source_citation: that was why he had come to see me and that's why he would try to come back another time to see me again if he could / maybe we would do it another time.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being promises to return to the witness and potentially take her on a future visit, mapping to M149 (beings promise to return to the witness, to take him).

encounter_events.source_citation: It seemed like—it seemed like it was just a special relationship with me
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia perceives a special, personal relationship with the being, implying the being has a particular interest in her specifically. This maps to M122 (they have watched witness a long time, have special interest).

encounter_events.source_citation: he just explains it like an adventure / 'Your Mom would be upset if we went away for a while, you know.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicates verbally in the witness's language, explaining things conversationally and referencing her mother. Maps to C101 (verbal communication in subject's language).

encounter_events.source_citation: he said it was a lot of fun, and that was why he had come to see me / It was as if he felt like it, he could or would
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is friendly, familiar, and warm in manner, speaking casually and personally to the witness. Maps to B900 (beings are friendly, polite, familiar in manner).

encounter_events.source_citation: the light might have been very bright. It seems like my eyes hurt me. / Maybe the light was very bright. Pretty, but bright.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia recalls her eyes hurting from bright light during the encounter. While this occurs during the encounter, she is recalling it as a physical effect on her eyes. Maps to A100 (eye troubles: burn, vision impaired, sensitive to light).

encounter_events.source_citation: you'd ask your grandfather if he would take you to town to go to a movie
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia compares the being to a grandfather figure, implying the being presents as an elder. Maps to B801 (one being is an elder).

encounter_events.source_citation: it wasn't an uncomfortable place / it's almost like there wasn't much even in the way of introductions / it wasn't like when you meet a stranger
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes feeling an immediate, unexplained sense of familiarity and comfort with the beings, as if she already knew them. This maps to E301 (friendly effect: witness senses kindness or feels as if known).

encounter_events.source_citation: he talked about the adventure of it as though he wasn't the only person who did it. People did it because it was a neat thing to learn, and a fun thing to look around
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being speaks in a friendly, casual, familiar manner about their activities, describing them as fun and adventurous. This maps to B900 (beings are friendly, polite, familiar in manner).

encounter_events.source_citation: he talked about the adventure of it as though he wasn't the only person who did it
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is verbally communicating with Virginia in her language about their activities. This maps to C101 (verbal communication in subject's language).

encounter_events.source_citation: People did it because it was a neat thing to learn, and a fun thing to look around
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being explains that they come to learn and explore, describing their purpose as learning and looking around. This maps to M125 (they have come to learn, teach or experiment).

encounter_events.source_citation: The general description of the circular walls
encounter_events.ai_justification: The investigator summarizes Virginia's earlier description of the examining room as having circular walls. This maps to U210 (round, oval room).

encounter_events.source_citation: the even, sourceless lighting of the examining room
encounter_events.ai_justification: The investigator paraphrases Virginia's description of even, sourceless lighting in the examining room. This maps to U230 (bright and uniform, without specific source).

encounter_events.source_citation: the examining room
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia described being in an examining room, which maps to U202 (examination room).

encounter_events.source_citation: Either that we had known each other, or about each other, or were just the kind of people who found it easy to get to know one another
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia's sense that the beings already knew about her, or had prior knowledge of her, implies a long-standing special interest. This maps to M122 (they have watched witness a long time, have special interest).

encounter_events.source_citation: ining room were gray and the floors shiny.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The walls are described as gray and floors as shiny, consistent with a metallic interior environment (U240).

encounter_events.source_citation: Virginia described this gray light as being very bright
encounter_events.ai_justification: The room is described as having very bright light without a specific source mentioned, consistent with bright uniform lighting (U230).

encounter_events.source_citation: she frequently rubbed her eyes during the hypnotic period. In her second session, she even complained that the subdued lighting in Dr. Clamar's office was too bright
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia experienced eye sensitivity and discomfort after the encounter, rubbing her eyes and finding normal lighting too bright. This is an aftereffect of eye trouble (A100).

encounter_events.source_citation: It was something like dental equipment, but much smoother. It didn't look like something abrasive or scary; it was more like, maybe half the size of your torso . . . mostly smooth like a metal box with rectangular contours, but rounded, and with fixtures
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia consciously recalled details about the equipment used during her encounter, describing a handheld or table-mounted instrument that made a cut on her leg. This maps to beings using handheld instruments (X220).

encounter_events.source_citation: the equipment which made the cut on her leg
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia described equipment that made a cut on her leg, which is an incision for unknown purpose (X222).

encounter_events.source_citation: Virginia discussed with Dr. Clamar and me some further specific details which she had consciously recalled. Hypnosis is an odd process in that most frequently after the subject comes out of the trance he or she continues to remember things.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia spontaneously recalled additional details after the hypnotic session ended, consistent with spontaneous return of memory (A116).

encounter_events.source_citation: It was as though the thing that touched me was just like a massager, like those electric massagers, the long ones. Just something simple-looking, almost a tubular thing. It reached out and just laid against my leg.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes a handheld tubular instrument that was placed against her leg during the examination, matching X220 (beings use handheld instruments).

encounter_events.source_citation: A soft vibration, maybe . . . I think I felt it, but I don't think I heard it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes feeling a soft vibration from the instrument/machine, consistent with U530 (buzzing, humming or other monotonous sound), though she felt rather than heard it.

encounter_events.source_citation: her story begins when she is already inside the examining room of the UFO / Virginia still had not remembered in detail that section of her encounter, so one can assume her unconscious mind effectively censored out the 'bad part.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia has no memory of how she entered the craft or the initial approach/paralysis phase. Her narrative begins already inside the examining room, indicating doorway amnesia for the entry sequence.

encounter_events.source_citation: her story begins when she is already inside the examining room of the UFO
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia recalls being inside an examining room aboard the UFO, indicating the craft contained a dedicated examination room.

encounter_events.source_citation: a piece of her flesh, a deep incision across many layers of skin and muscle
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings made a deep incision across multiple layers of skin and muscle, removing a piece of flesh. This constitutes an incision for unknown purpose.

encounter_events.source_citation: they needed to take a 'little, bitty piece' of her
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings scraped/cut a sample of tissue from the witness, described as taking a 'little, bitty piece' of her, consistent with skin/tissue sample taking.

encounter_events.source_citation: Virginia's very noticeable scar
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia bore a very noticeable scar as a physical aftereffect of the encounter, consistent with a linear or circular scar of unknown origin.

encounter_events.source_citation: One of the differences between Virginia's encounter and the other abduction reports we have been considering is her apparent lack of any fear.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia displayed an apparent lack of fear during the encounter, suggesting a pacification or calm state during the experience.
